name: 47 - Wf Telegram Inbound Polling getUpdates TEST ONLY - TEMPLATE

parameters.content:
TEMPLATE ONLY — active=false. No Telegram Trigger. No public HTTPS webhook.

Wf: Manual polling concept via getUpdates (UI token placeholder only).

URL placeholder (never put real token in Git):
  https://api.telegram.org/bot__CONFIGURE_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_IN_N8N_UI_OR_CREDENTIAL__/getUpdates

Formats:
  dp:D-9998-T:1|2|3  OR plain 1/2/3 for open decision
  note:D-9998-T:<text> (design only)

Configure in UI only:
- **CONFIGURE_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN_IN_N8N_UI_OR_CREDENTIAL**
- **CONFIGURE_ALLOWED_CHAT_ID_IN_N8N_UI**
- **CONFIGURE_OFFSET_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**
- **CONFIGURE_DECISION_STATE_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**

getUpdates conflicts with active webhook — deleteWebhook is a separate runtime gate.
No Schedule Trigger. No production Data Table id in Git.

OFFSET STORE PLACEHOLDER — **CONFIGURE_OFFSET_STORE_IN_N8N_UI**
Demo uses workflow staticData only. No production table id in Git.
